summary: Three reviewers (codeanalyzer v2, tester v2, security v2) PASSED. Walked the seams between them — canonicalization four-file chain (WireJsonConverter ↔ crypto/Default ↔ plang.@this.OutboundOptions ↔ ContextLessFallback), the ! operator parser-to-writer composition, the Properties insertion/wire/navigation triangle, the LiftDataIfShaped depth-bomb bound. Story holds. Two minor endorsements; no critical or major.

previous_reviews_assessed.codeanalyzer: agree — each F1–F11 closure lands at the cited line numbers; ref-counted MarkOuterForHash composes; SerializerMismatch error path real; F9/F11 deferrals documented in code.
previous_reviews_assessed.tester: agree — mutation test on Stage 2 (OutboundOptions → Default makes 3 tests fail) is the right load-bearing check; their two weak-assertion notes are real.
previous_reviews_assessed.security: agree — re-traced LiftDataIfShaped recursion bound through ParseValue's MaxDepth inheritance; v1 HIGH retraction to Info is correct.

findings.issue: %archived!Type% assertion passes via Data infrastructure reflection fallback (this.Navigation.cs:318), not via Properties scope. compress sets Data.Type, not Properties["Type"]. The test reads like Stage 4 ! operator coverage but exercises the legacy fallback path.
findings.impact: Test name suggests a Properties-scope contract; future Stage 4 tightening that removes the fallback path would silently flip this from a real assertion to a NotFound. Endorses tester F1.
findings.suggestion: Either use %archived.Type.Value% (explicit Data infrastructure) or split into a separate Properties-scope test.

findings.issue: `public async Task<data.@this<byte[]>> Run() => Crypto.Hash(this);` — async keyword wraps a synchronous body. Should emit CS1998 but appears suppressed at project level.
findings.impact: Cosmetic. The deeper question (why is Crypto.Hash sync given EnsureSigned runs sync-over-async inside it?) is the same F3 carve-out coder documented and architect deferred.
findings.suggestion: `public Task<data.@this<byte[]>> Run() => Task.FromResult(Crypto.Hash(this));` — or fold this into the pre-walk async EnsureSigned pass when that lands.

process_notes: .bot/data-serialize-cleanup/coder/ folder missing — no summary.md, no v<N>/plan.md, no coder session in report.json. Tester already flagged. Work landed correctly; surfacing once for downstream handoffs.
